positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition should be centrally arranged and highly graphic, featuring geometric representations of trees and glowing flora. Dominant colors are deep indigo, ethereal gold, and vibrant teal, providing high contrast against a slightly textured, parchment-like background. Use clean silhouettes and sharp outlines, mimicking a vintage scientific diagram style blended with modern psychedelic art. Include abstract elements like constellations and flowing nebula patterns that frame the main subject. The overall mood is mystical and dreamy, optimized for wearable textile printing. Vector art aesthetic, highly detailed.
